content: Unearthed alive from a shallow grave behind the old executioner's block
duplicateOf: Raised in the shadow of the executioner's block

removed: savagely connects with {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}
kept: {{defender}} grunts as {{attacker}}'s strike connects solidly with the {{bodyPart}}.

removed: {{attacker}} brings {{possessive}} {{weapon}} down like a thunderbolt, obliterating {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}}.
kept: {{attacker}} heaves {{possessive}} {{weapon}} overhead and brings it down like a falling mountain, smashing {{defender}}'s {{bodyPart}} into pulp.

removed: {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} bites deep into the {{bodyPart}}!
kept: {{attacker}}'s {{weapon}} punches through {{defender}}'s guard and bites into the {{bodyPart}}!

removed: A stiff jab pops {{defender}}'s head back.
kept: A stiff jab from {{attacker}} snaps {{defender}}'s head back.

removed: {{attacker}} hacks wildly with {{possessive}} {{weapon}}, a flurry of relentless slashes!
kept: {{attacker}} slashes viciously with {{possessive}} {{weapon}}!

removed: {{attacker}} sweeps {{possessive}} {{weapon}} in a wide, singing arc!
kept: {{attacker}} sweeps {{possessive}} {{weapon}} in a wide, punishing arc, biting deeply into {{defender}}'s flesh.

removed: {{attacker}} carves a brutal crescent through the air with {{possessive}} {{weapon}}.
kept: {{attacker}} carves the air with a brutal downward slash from {{possessive}} {{weapon}}!

removed: Like a falling boulder, {{attacker}} brings {{possessive}} {{weapon}} crashing down with horrific force.
kept: {{attacker}} brings {{possessive}} {{weapon}} down with immense force!

removed: RIGHT UPPER ARM
kept: RIGHT ARM

removed: LEFT UPPER ARM
kept: LEFT ARM

removed: RIGHT LOWER LEG
kept: RIGHT LEG

removed: LEFT LOWER LEG
kept: LEFT LEG

removed: {{defender}} makes it look easy as he gracefully dodges the blow.
kept: {{defender}} gracefully dodges the blow.

removed: {{defender}} throws up their weapon in a blind panic, somehow managing a block.
kept: {{defender}} throws up their weapon in a blind panic, somehow managing to deflect the blow!

removed: With a flick of the wrist, {{defender}} confidently deflects the strike.
kept: With a flick of the wrist, {{defender}} effortlessly turns the heavy strike aside.

removed: {{defender}} catches the blow on {{possessive}} shield rim.
kept: {{defender}} catches the blow on their SHIELD.

removed: {{attacker}} smashes right through {{defender}}'s attempted parry!
kept: {{attacker}} smashes straight through {{defender}}'s attempted parry.

removed: {{name}} scrambles back to {{possessive}} feet.
kept: {{name}} springs back to {{possessive}} feet in an instant, moving with impossible, fluid speed.

removed: {{name}} springs back to {{possessive}} feet in an instant, refusing to show weakness!
kept: {{name}} scrambles back to {{possessive}} feet.

removed: {{name}} scrambles backward like a cornered rat, desperately returning to {{possessive}} feet.
kept: {{name}} scrambles back to {{possessive}} feet.

removed: {{name}} scrambles back to their feet in a blind panic, desperately seeking their weapon.
kept: {{name}} scrambles back to {{possessive}} feet.

removed: {{name}} uses {{possessive}} weapon as a crutch to drag {{reflexive}} back into a fighting stance.
kept: {{name}} hops back to a fighting stance.

removed: It feels like an eternity as {{defender}} crumbles to the arena floor.
kept: It feels like an eternity as {{defender}} crumples to the arena floor.

removed: A blur of motion on the ground!
kept: In a blur of motion, {{defender}} is violently hurled to the ground!

removed: The warriors appear equal in overall abilities.
kept: The warriors appear equal in skill.

removed: A collective gasp ripples through the coliseum as the brutal reality of the strike sets in.
kept: A collective gasp echoes through the coliseum.

removed: Precision meets raw power in this clash.
kept: Precision meets power in this fascinating clash!

removed: The ARENAMASTER halts the bout! {{defender}} cannot continue. {{attacker}} is the victor!
kept: {{defender}} motions to the ARENAMASTER that {{pronoun}} cannot continue! {{attacker}} is the victor of the match!

removed: The crowd howls for a brutal execution, their bloodlust practically vibrating the arena stones!
kept: The crowd howls for a brutal finish!
